name: Clam & Shrimp Chowder
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Cooked peeled medium shrimp, thawed if frozen
1 Red bell pepper, seeded and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan.
2. Add onion, celery, potatoes, and fennel seeds. Cook gently for 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
3. Blend in flour and cook for 1 minute.
4. Stir in paprika and chicken stock, then bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
5. Cover the pot, reduce heat, and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Stir in clams, shrimp, red bell pepper, and corn. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
7. Stir in half-and-half, salt, and pepper. Adjust seasoning if needed.
8. Garnish with fresh dill sprig, if desired, and serve hot.
Variation: Omit paprika and add 1 teaspoon curry powder. Add 1 tablespoon chopped fresh parsley or cilantro just before serving.
